{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Sylvan Dreamseeds
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Sylvan Dreamseeds]] are born under the influence of [[dream aura]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12">''Ghostwater'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Sylvan Dreamseeds]] are born in areas where the [[library]] and the Well create the right conditions.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
